# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  ApplicationAssetsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "application-assets-${AWS::Region}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false

Outputs:
  ApplicationAssetsBucketName:
    Value: !Ref ApplicationAssetsBucket
